response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified the video as a montage of fan messages for 'hololive 7th fes.' with a continuous background song. 2. Identified the song title from on-screen text as 'Ridin' on Dreams' by hololive IDOL PROJECT. 3. Used web search to find the official lyrics for 'Ridin' on Dreams'. 4. Mapped the entire video to a single scene as the music is constant throughout. 5. Formatted all data into the required JSON structure.
response.global_summary: A video featuring a montage of fan-submitted messages for 'hololive 7th fes.' set to the background track 'Ridin' on Dreams' by hololive IDOL PROJECT.

scenes.description: A series of static images featuring fan messages and art for 'hololive 7th fes.' with the song 'Ridin' on Dreams' playing throughout.

Hey, it's because you were there
Hey, I want to say thank you again and again
Right now, I want to tell you
Come on, let's get on board!
Ridin' on dreams

Yeah!!

It became a feeling
I couldn't have imagined
The excitement won't stop!

Right now, we're rowing
Through an endless journey, there will be difficulties too
But let's turn that into strength
And move forward together!

Let's overcome the rough waves too
I want to shine in my own way

In a world of the unknown with no map
Let's keep going!
Ridin' on dreams
